column1: This setting will be used to enable compression for new images as soon as they are uploaded via Magento admin
column2: This setting will be used to enable compression for new images as soon as they are uploaded via Magento admin

column1: This setting will be used to define how many number of images you want to process when the cron job runs. Please note this number should be reasonable especially when you have multiple stores and many additional product images
column2: This setting will be used to define how many number of images you want to process when the cron job runs. Please note this number should be reasonable especially when you have multiple stores and many additional product images

column1: This setting will be used to include list of folders you want to include for compressing the images
column2: This setting will be used to include list of folders you want to include for compressing the images

column1: This setting will be used to further compress cached product images generated by Magento. We would recommend to leave this setting turned off especially when you clear your cached images frequently and you have more than 5 additional images on the product page.
column2: This setting will be used to further compress cached product images generated by Magento. We would recommend to leave this setting turned off especially when you clear your cached images frequently and you have more than 5 additional images on the product page.

column1: This setting will be used to define which image compression provider should be used
column2: This setting will be used to define which image compression provider should be used

column1:
This setting will be used to define API url for your image compression provider as shown below
Resmush.it - http://api.resmush.it/ws.php?img=
ImageOptim - https://im2.io/{{username}}/full/
Kraken.io - https://api.kraken.io/v1/url
column2:
This setting will be used to define API url for your image compression provider as shown below

column1:
This setting will be used to exclude list of folders you want to exclude for compressing the images from media directory (comma separated)
for example foldername1, foldername2, /foldername/subfolder1, foldername/subfolder2
column2:
This setting will be used to exclude list of folders you want to exclude for compressing the images from media directory (comma separated)

column1: This setting will be used to enable backup original images before compression
column2: This setting will be used to enable backup original images before compression

column1: This setting will be used to log information to the log file under /var/log/image_optimiser-yyyymmdd.log
column2: This setting will be used to log information to the log file under /var/log/image_optimiser-yyyymmdd.log

column1:
This setting will be used to allow you to define schedule how often you want to optimise images 
* * * * *
| | | | |
| | | | +---- Day of the Week   (range: 1-7, 1 standing for Monday)
| | | +------ Month of the Year (range: 1-12)
| | +-------- Day of the Month  (range: 1-31)
| +---------- Hour              (range: 0-23)
+------------ Minute            (range: 0-59)
Example: 0 0 * * * Daily at midnight
